extraction.one_line_summary: TRENTIN Matteo won bunch sprint at Tarragona after Quick-Step positioned him perfectly on left side of road at 60km/h
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step demonstrated systematic stage finish reconnaissance advantage, winning both tactical stages (Lambrecht Stage 1, Trentin Stage 4) through superior positioning knowledge.
Peloton controlled 7.5min gap aggressively despite heat, reducing deficit 1min/10km systematically from Col de Beixalis onwards, revealing commitment to sprint.

rider_signals.POZDEYEV: negative: crashed before 3km line while sitting 9th GC, showing vulnerability in nervous sprint run-ins despite time protection rule
rider_signals.MORENO Dani: negative: crashed in nervous sprint approach despite no GC threat, suggesting positioning issues in flat finishes
